title: Coco 'n' the Fellas @ Toulouse Lautrec
titleBg: Coco 'n' the Fellas в Toulouse Lautrec
description: A sophisticated fusion of swing and contemporary jazz with the international quartet in South London.
descriptionEn: A sophisticated fusion of swing and contemporary jazz with the international quartet in South London.
descriptionBg: Изискана комбинация от суинг и съвременен джаз с международния квартет в Южен Лондон.
body:
"Their music evokes both swing and contemporary jazz simultaneously."


Bebop, French Gypsy Swing and a little bit of jazz-fusion to ensure an amazing night! Coco ‘n’ the Fellas originally started as a Gypsy tribute quartet but soon found love in composing and arranging in their own style. Stretching the boundaries of the Swing traditions Coco will transport you to a sonic landscape of gypsy jazz, bebop, fusion and more... The band has been touring England, Scotland, Italy, Switzerland and even Bulgaria throughout the last year. Playing at renown venues such as Torino Jazz Club, Studio 5 Jazz Club, Be-bop café as well as featuring at radio stations and tv shown within Europe. 

Door: 8.30pm
Show: 9.30pm
Room: The Jazz Club

£15 On the Door
Online Tickets from £10
https://www.designmynight.com/london/whats-on/live-music/coco-n-the-fellas?t=tickets

Only Bar food will be served in the Jazz Club.

To dine from the á la carte menu before the show 
Please call 020 7582 6800 or Book Online
Please allow 60-90 minutes for dinner reservations.

Coco 'n' the Fellas: 
Ami Oprenova - Vocals
Daniele Ciuffreda - Electric Guitar
Joe Perkins - Acoustic Guitar
Havard Tanner - Double Bass
bodyEn:
"Their music evokes both swing and contemporary jazz simultaneously."

Bebop, French Gypsy Swing, and a little bit of jazz-fusion to ensure an amazing night! Coco ‘n’ the Fellas will transport you to a sonic landscape of gypsy jazz, bebop, fusion and more. The band has been touring across Europe, playing at renowned venues such as Torino Jazz Club and Studio 5.

Ami Oprenova - Vocals
Daniele Ciuffreda - Electric Guitar
Joe Perkins - Acoustic Guitar
Håvard Tanner - Double Bass
bodyBg:
„Тяхната музика извиква едновременно суинг и съвременен джаз.“

Бибоп, френски джипси суинг и малко джаз-фюжън гарантират невероятна вечер! Coco ‘n’ the Fellas ще ви пренесат в звуков пейзаж от джипси джаз, бибоп, фюжън и още. Групата е обиколила Европа, свирейки на престижни сцени като Torino Jazz Club и Studio 5.

Ами Опренова - вокал
Даниеле Чуфреда - електрическа китара
Джо Пъркинс - акустична китара
Хавард Танер - контрабас
